query: SELECT bl.id, bl.bl_number, bl.status, bl.origin_port, bl.destination_port, bl.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, bl.vessel_name, bl.carrier FROM bills_of_lading bl LEFT JOIN customers c ON bl.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY bl.id;
